rationale: Trump's Iran diplomacy continues as the dominant policy story — strike halt sustained, Iran cautious, no deal finalized — keeping markets and Middle East policy in focus for US residents.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; Iran weighs proposal
top_events.summary: Trump maintains strike pause after Kharg Island threat; Iran cautious but engaging; deal not finalized. Active, evolving policy situation with market and military implications for Americans.

top_events.title: Indian sailors killed in Hormuz amid US-Iran ceasefire
top_events.summary: Ongoing Hormuz Strait danger signals deal fragility; oil shipping risk remains real for US energy markets.

top_events.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons at Guantánamo visit
top_events.summary: US Defense Secretary makes direct diplomatic warning to Cuba; minor but reflects active US military posture in the hemisphere.
